hero.title: We make media content that fits your needs
hero.subtitle: From large projects to small productions
hero.description: In our media services, we guide companies through three main stages: detailed planning before production, effective production using expert teams, and precise post-production to create a final product that not only looks great but also communicates effectively

services.pageDescription: At Belqees Media, we offer a comprehensive range of services in media production, studio setup, technical consultation, and training. With over six years of hands-on experience, we deliver turnkey solutions tailored to the needs of television channels, production houses, and media organizations.

studioSetup.description: We specialize in setting up and operating professional studios — from identifying the right location, designing flexible and functional décor, to equipping the studio with cutting-edge technology. We ensure smooth and professional day-to-day operations.

approach.description: We provide a complete audiovisual service. We allocate our team and equipment according to each project's needs, ensuring customized production with high quality. We are committed to innovation, exceptional customer service, and the highest standards of ethics and editorial integrity.

about.pageSubtitle: Belqees Media is a full-service media production company founded in 2015
about.title: BELQEES MEDIA

intro.title: About the Company
intro.description: Belqees Media, founded in 2015, is a dynamic and forward-thinking media production company offering high-quality services both inside and outside Turkey. With years of experience and a multinational team, we combine creative, editorial, and technical expertise to support a diverse range of clients and media partners.
intro.services: We provide a wide range of services including live streaming, event coverage, studio setup, media production, and technical consultancy tailored for television channels and organizations.

channel.title: Belqees Channel
channel.description: We operate Belqees Channel, a 24/7 satellite news station, supported by three fully equipped studios, modern broadcast technology, and an integrated headquarters that connects all editorial and technical departments for seamless production workflows.

systems.title: Our Broadcast & Media Systems
systems.description: We rely on advanced media systems to ensure a smooth, professional, and fully integrated workflow — from content creation to final broadcast.

octopus.title: Octopus Newsroom
octopus.description: A modern newsroom computer system (NRCS) that streamlines news planning, scripting, and rundown management from the field to broadcast.

metus.title: Metus MAM
metus.description: A media asset management and archiving solution used to organize, store, and retrieve video content efficiently across production teams.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm 3D
brainstorm.description: Real-time 3D graphics and virtual set solutions for dynamic, high-quality broadcast visuals.

adobe.title: Adobe Creative Cloud
adobe.description: A professional suite of tools for video editing, motion graphics, and design, used to produce high-quality visual content.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide our work

innovativeEfficiency.title: Innovative Efficiency
innovativeEfficiency.description: We use the latest technologies and innovative methods to ensure high efficiency in every project

buildingConnections.title: Building Connections
buildingConnections.description: We believe in the power of long-term relationships with our clients and partners to achieve mutual success

forwardVision.title: Forward Vision
forwardVision.description: We always look to the future and prepare for upcoming challenges and opportunities in the media world

about.specialization: We specialize in providing end-to-end services for broadcasters and content creators, including:
about.team: With a skilled multinational team — including technical engineers, directors, editors, and media consultants — we serve clients both inside and outside Turkey. Our company is committed to innovation, exceptional customer service, and the highest standards of ethics and editorial integrity.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.description: At Belqees Media, we proudly serve a diverse network of partners — including television channels, production companies, institutions, and organizations — who rely on us for a wide range of media services. From live streaming and event coverage to studio setup, media production, and technical consultancy, our partners trust us to deliver creative, reliable, and high-quality solutions tailored to their unique needs. These long-term relationships reflect our ongoing commitment to professionalism, innovation, and client satisfaction in every project we undertake.

footer.description: A full-service media production company founded in 2015, dedicated to providing high-quality solutions for television channels, digital platforms, and live events.
